name: @ce-net/gov
description: Governance, policy, and abuse-monitoring app for CE-net. Pre-run policy scan, runtime monitoring, and reputation-weighted expert voting. Built entirely on CE primitives (HTTP API, CEP-1 signals, blobs, ce-cap, /history). Zero heavy dependencies, vanilla ES-module JavaScript.
author: Leif Rydenfalk <ledamecrydenfalk@gmail.com>

scripts.check: for f in src/*.js examples/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo 'all files OK'
scripts.selftest: node src/reputation.js && node src/proposals.js --selftest && node src/voting.js && node src/validator.js && node src/scan.js && node src/policy.js && node src/monitor.js --selftest
scripts.examples: node examples/propose-ban-porn.js && node examples/tally-demo.js && node examples/scan-demo.js && node examples/monitor-demo.js
